name: Tolgee
tagline: Tolgee is a localization management platform for developers and translators.
description:
Tolgee is a localization management platform for developers and translators.

Docs: https://tolgee.io/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  tolgee:
    image: tolgee/tolgee
    environment:
      - TOLGEE_AUTHENTICATION_ENABLED=true
      - TOLGEE_AUTHENTICATION_INITIAL_PASSWORD=81a7f87ba3d4f1c97ce96dca2c7d243e
      - TOLGEE_AUTHENTICATION_INITIAL_USERNAME=admin
      - TOLGEE_AUTHENTICATION_JWT_SECRET=b88aec5965d386625d1822f7af2d0703
      - TOLGEE_POSTGRES_AUTOSTART_ENABLED=false
      - SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://postgresql:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-tolgee}
      - SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=u1b3340bb08
      - SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=fa3a02b688bc86d9253d251d678cafe5
    volumes:
      - tolgee-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -q
        - --spider
        - http://127.0.0.1:8080
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42124:8080
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    volumes:
      - tolgee-postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u1b3340bb08
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=fa3a02b688bc86d9253d251d678cafe5
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-tolgee}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv7e31a0f4} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-tolgee}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  tolgee-data: null
  tolgee-postgresql-data: null
